dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, opportunity does not knock twice. There is a power vacuum and every schemer is circling the empty chair.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since {quest_origin}, I have spent years building connections and waiting for this moment. But my rivals are moving fast. {target_npc} has already started making promises they cannot deliver. The {enemy_type_plural} near {quest_focus_the} are the real problem: whoever controls that area controls the outcome. I need you to clear them out {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Help me claim {quest_stakes_the}, and you will have the ear of the most powerful person in the region. {quest_reward_hint} is only the beginning.

dialogueChunks.intro: Keep your voice down, {player_name}. What I am offering could make us both very wealthy, or very dead.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A discovery was made {location_hint} last week. The {enemy_type_plural} have been spotted near the site, which is the only reason nobody else has moved on it yet. {target_npc} has been sniffing around. If they beat me to the claim, {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} worthless. I need you to clear the {enemy_type_plural} out before they can organize a defense.
dialogueChunks.outro: Fortune favors the bold, not the cautious. {quest_reward_hint} awaits those who move first.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I do not need a hero. I need someone practical who understands that winning is not always clean.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The current leader is corrupt, but everyone loves them because they smile well and give pretty speeches. {target_npc} has proof of their misdeeds hidden {location_hint}, but getting to it means dealing with the {enemy_type_plural} that have overrun the area. I need the path cleared so my people can move in.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is not about ambition. It is about replacing someone unworthy with someone who is not afraid to make hard choices. {quest_focus_The} demands action, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} hanging in the balance.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I am going to be direct with you. I want power. Not for vanity: for results.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement's defenses are a joke. {quest_threat_animate_The} {quest_threat_animate_has} been probing our perimeter since {quest_origin}, and the current leadership does nothing but talk. I need to demonstrate what real action looks like. The {enemy_type_plural} have a nest {location_hint} near {quest_focus_the}. Wipe them out, and I will use that victory to rally support.
dialogueChunks.outro: Destroy the {enemy_type_plural} and you hand me the proof I need. In return, {quest_reward_hint} and a powerful ally.

dialogueChunks.intro: Everyone wants the same thing, {player_name}. They just lack the nerve to reach for it. I do not.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been contested since {quest_origin}. {target_npc} laid claim first, but they lack the strength to hold it. The {enemy_type_plural} roaming the area {location_hint} are the wild card: whoever deals with them controls the territory. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} the prize.
dialogueChunks.outro: Clear the {enemy_type_plural} for me and I take the territory. Refuse, and {target_npc} gets it instead: with worse results for everyone.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the settlement needs a leader who acts instead of deliberating. I intend to be that leader.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: My plan hinges on securing {quest_focus_the}, but {quest_threat_the} stands in the way. The {enemy_type_plural} have infested the area {location_hint} and every failed attempt to clear them makes the current leadership look more capable by comparison. I cannot afford another failure. I need someone who will get it done.
dialogueChunks.outro: Kill the {enemy_type_plural} and you give me the victory I need. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} worth the fight.
